headline: Primary JUST ecosystem addresses identified on Tron from secondary sources; protocol documentation and GitHub repositories not accessible

findings.text: JST token address TCFLL5dx5ZJdKnWuesXxi1VPwjLVmWZZy9 and USDJ stablecoin address TMwFHYXLJaRUPeW6421aqXL4ZEzPRFGkGT identified from TRON API documentation and secondary sources
Official protocol website (https://just.network) not accessible for retrieval of deployed contracts documentation; attempted alternative URL (justnetwork.io/token) also unreachable
No audit links provided in protocol context; audit reports not discovered through general search
No GitHub repository provided in protocol context; unable to locate canonical source code repository
Protocol operates on single chain (Tron); no multi-chain deployments to cross-reference
No factory contracts identified for enumeration of child contracts
Identified contracts classified by apparent role from secondary sources: token (JST, USDJ), wrapped asset (WTRX)
All identified addresses sourced from cited URLs; no snippet-only sightings

rationale.verdict: Discovery unable to complete due to inaccessibility of primary sources (official website, GitHub, audit links). Only secondary sources (TRON API documentation, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap) provided evidence of core token addresses. Without access to deployed contracts documentation or source code repositories, comprehensive address enumeration for the bridge and supporting infrastructure contracts cannot be achieved. Set grading_basis to off-chain-only because fetches of primary sources failed and only secondary data sources were available.

evidence.shows: TRON API documentation contains contract address TCFLL5dx5ZJdKnWuesXxi1VPwjLVmWZZy9 for JST token and contract address TMwFHYXLJaRUPeW6421aqXL4ZEzPRFGkGT for USDJ stablecoin
USDJ stablecoin contract address TMwFHYXLJaRUPeW6421aqXL4ZEzPRFGkGT referenced in TRON transaction documentation
JUST described as decentralized financial platform on TRON network with DeFi solutions including JustStable, JustLend, and cross-chain tokens
JUST ecosystem structure with USDJ stablecoin and JST governance token; describes JustCryptos as bridging protocol for cross-chain transactions
JustCryptos described as bridge connecting premium crypto currencies from TRON and other public chains; introduces token value to power JUST ecosystem
WTRX token referenced with address TNUC9Qb1rRpS5CbWLmNMxXBjyFoydXjWFR tagged with just.network URL

unknowns: D1-offchain: Block explorer name-tag search for 'JustCryptos' on TRON not performed; direct tronscan.org URL fetch blocked
D2-offchain: Canonical deployed contracts documentation page not accessible; https://just.network/token and justnetwork.io/token both unreachable
D3-offchain: No audit PDFs provided in protocol context; audit discovery search not performed
D4-offchain: No GitHub repository URL provided; canonical source code repository not discovered
D6-offchain: Factory pattern enumeration not attempted; insufficient contract identification to determine if factories exist
D8: Unable to verify completeness of address discovery; may be missing bridge contract addresses, governance addresses, and supporting infrastructure due to source unavailability

protocol_metadata.about: JustCryptos is a bridge protocol on the TRON network that connects premium cryptocurrencies from TRON and other public blockchains. The protocol introduces cross-chain token assets to power the broader JUST ecosystem, which comprises decentralized stablecoin lending (JustStable), money market services (JustLend), automated market making (JustSwap), and oracle services (JustLink). The governance token JST enables community participation in protocol decisions and fee mechanisms.
